title: Pori, Satakunta — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Pori, Satakunta: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Pori is a city in Satakunta with a population of 84,000. A coastal city on the Kokemäenjoki River, known for its jazz festival, Yyteri sand dunes, and industrial heritage.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
